summary: Completed testing of CarouselEx UI refactor iteration 13. Major UI structure requirements are implemented but critical backend LLM budget issue prevents full functionality testing. Authentication issues also limit comprehensive UI testing.

critical_bugs.issue: LLM API budget exceeded - all AI features failing with 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.68750775, Max budget: 0.6668283168000028'
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all core AI functionality including content generation, viral scoring, platform adaptation

working_endpoints.status: Working - save and list operations successful

ui_bugs.issue: Session management issues - frequent redirects to login page even after successful login

integration_issues.issue: Cannot properly test Create Content page functionality due to authentication redirects

passed_tests: Sidebar has exactly 5 navigation items: Home, Create Content, Content Library, Trends, Settings
Settings page has Brand tab with required fields (Tone, Writing Style, Niche, Default Platform)
Brand tab has Save button functionality
Settings page has all 6 tabs: Profile, Brand, Billing, Voice, Personas, Security
Basic CRUD operations working for non-AI features
Voice Profiles and Personas management working
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix LLM API budget issue - all AI-powered features are failing due to budget exceeded error. This prevents testing of core Create Content functionality, content generation, viral scoring, and other AI features. Also investigate authentication/session management issues causing frequent login redirects.

success_percentage.backend: 56% (14/25 tests passed - non-AI features working, all AI features failing due to budget)
success_percentage.frontend: 70% (UI structure correct, authentication issues prevent full testing)
